title: Extraction of alarm substance in zebrafish
author: Rhayra Xavier do Carmo Silva
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.tr3em8n

steps.title: Separate a donor fish from the...
steps.instruction: Separate a donor fish from the home tank and transport to the experiment area

steps.title: Make crushed ice using cubes made...
steps.instruction: Make crushed ice using cubes made from mineral water Ice Contributed by users

steps.title: Fill a 2L beaker with water...
steps.instruction: Fill a 2L beaker with water from the fish facility Graduated Plastic Beakers, 2000ml Bio Basic Inc. Catalog #BK044-2K.SIZE.1

steps.title: Bring the water temperature to 17...
steps.instruction: Bring the water temperature to 17 °C by adding the ice chips

steps.title: Use a net to transfer the...
steps.instruction: Use a net to transfer the fish from the container to the cold water

steps.title: Slowly add ice chips to the...
steps.instruction: Slowly add ice chips to the beaker to bring the temperature down to 12 °C . The animal is considered anesthetized when it no longer reacts to gentle manipulation.

steps.title: Transfer the anesthetized fish to a...
steps.instruction: Transfer the anesthetized fish to a Petri dish Glass Petri dishes 90 x 15 cm Contributed by users

steps.title: Quickly decapitate the animal using a scapel; discard the head
steps.instruction: Quickly decapitate the animal using a scapel; discard the head

steps.title: Remove excess blood using a swab...
steps.instruction: Remove excess blood using a swab Cotton Gauze Swabs (10 x 10cm x 8 ply) Contributed by users Catalog #G5201 Emh40/0404

steps.title: Transfer the body to another Petri dish
steps.instruction: Transfer the body to another Petri dish

steps.title: Using a scalpel, make 15 superficial...
steps.instruction: Using a scalpel, make 15 superficial cuts in both sides of the trunk scalpel blades Contributed by users

steps.title: Wash the body with 10 ml...
steps.instruction: Wash the body with 10 ml ddH2O Distilled Water Contributed by users

steps.title: Remove scales and other impurities from the solution
steps.instruction: Remove scales and other impurities from the solution

steps.title: Transfer 7 ml from the solution...
steps.instruction: Transfer 7 ml from the solution to a Falcon tube 15 ml sterile falcon tubes and rack Contributed by users

steps.title: Store on ice or refrigerator for up to 4 h
steps.instruction: Store on ice or refrigerator for up to 4 h.
